---
name: Feature request
about: Propose an enhancement to OmniCoder
title: "[FEAT] <short summary>"
labels: ["enhancement", "triage"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem statement

<!-- What problem are you trying to solve? Who is affected? What does the
current workflow force you to do that you wish it didn't? -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- Describe the ideal behavior. Be concrete: what would OmniCoder do,
from the user's perspective? Include example commands, config snippets,
or agent/skill invocations if relevant. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Other approaches you explored and why you discarded them. Even a
brief "I thought about X but it doesn't work because Y" is useful. -->

## Impact surface

Which parts of OmniCoder would this change touch? (check all that apply)

- [ ] Agents (`agents/`)
- [ ] Skills (`skills/`)
- [ ] Hooks (`hooks/`)
- [ ] Commands (`commands/`)
- [ ] Scripts / installers (`scripts/`)
- [ ] Configuration (`config/`)
- [ ] Documentation (`docs/`, `README.md`, `OMNICODER.md`)
- [ ] Other: <specify>

## Additional context

<!-- Links to related discussions, similar features in other tools, benchmarks,
screenshots, or anything else that helps reviewers evaluate the request. -->
